# Package.Dependency.Kind.fileSystem(name:path:)

**Case**

A dependency located at the given path.

## Declaration

```swift
case fileSystem(name: String?, path: String)
```

## Parameters

- **name**: The name of the dependency.
- **path**: The path to the dependency.
